com.burningcode.jira.web.action.issue
Class ManageWatchersReindex

java.lang.Object
  webwork.action.ActionSupport
      com.atlassian.jira.action.JiraActionSupport
          com.atlassian.jira.web.action.JiraWebActionSupport
              com.atlassian.jira.web.action.ProjectActionSupport
                  com.atlassian.jira.web.action.IssueActionSupport
                      com.atlassian.jira.web.action.issue.AbstractIssueSelectAction
                          com.atlassian.jira.web.action.issue.ManageWatchers
                              com.burningcode.jira.web.action.issue.ManageWatchersReindex
All Implemented Interfaces:
ErrorCollection, I18nHelper, IssueSummaryAware, Serializable, webwork.action.Action, webwork.action.CommandDriven, webwork.action.IllegalArgumentAware, webwork.action.ParameterAware
public class ManageWatchersReindex
extends ManageWatchers

This class is used to reindex an issue when watchers are added via the "Manage Watch List" control. Thanks to the developers at Voters and Watchers Custom Field (http://confluence.atlassian.com/display/JIRAEXT/Voters+and+Watchers+Custom+Field) for their work on ManageWatcherAlias. Your code is awesome! I can not take credit for this code as it is essentially the same as ManageWatcherAlias.

Author:
Ray Barham
See Also:
ManageWatchers, votersAndWatchers.ManageWatcherAlias, Serialized Form

Method Summary
 String doStartWatchers()
          Causes the current issue to be reindexed when watchers are added.
 String doStartWatching()
          Causes the current issue to be reindexed when the current users starts watching the issue.
 String doStopWatchers()
          Causes the current issue to be reindexed when watchers are removed.
 String doStopWatching()
          Causes the current issue to be reindexed when the current users stops watching the issue.
